title: Deck Dash
description: Sprint across an endless slide deck, dodging typos, pop-ups, and last-minute chaos.

title: Formula Firewall
description: Defend your spreadsheet from corrupted data errors marching across the grid.

title: Cat Care
description: Feed, play with, and grow a desk pet between meetings.

title: Spot the Difference
description: Find what changed between two nearly-identical office scenes.

title: Number Streak
description: Guess whether the next number is higher or lower and keep your streak alive. No cards, no suits, no betting — just odds.

title: Card Memory
description: Classic memory-match: flip two cards at a time and clear the board.

title: Word Search
description: Find hidden office-life words in a letter grid before time runs out.
